name: OpenNeuro
description: A free and open platform for sharing BIDS-formatted neuroimaging data (MRI, MEG, EEG, iEEG, PET, ASL). It hosts thousands of public datasets — including many naturalistic and social-cognition studies — with versioning, DOIs, and validation. The single best starting point for discovering openly available human brain-imaging data for social neuroscience.
citation: Markiewicz CJ, Gorgolewski KJ, Feingold F, et al. (2021). The OpenNeuro resource for sharing of neuroscience data. eLife, 10, e71774.

publications.title: The OpenNeuro resource for sharing of neuroscience data
